since_last: 56% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.62%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.28% · BTC +0.32% · Gold +0.00% · Nasdaq100 +0.76%. 56% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.62%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.62%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +6.07%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +6.07%, MRVL +5.32%, AMBA +5.11%, BABA +4.01%, MU +3.98%. Laggards: AI -3.80%, ORCL -3.73%, ADBE -2.90%, CBRS -2.82%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.15% at $122.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
